title: RoboWings
description: Retextures the elytra to look like a wing/jetpack
body:
Retextures the elytra to look like a wing/jetpack.
Entity Texture Features is required for emissives and different colored navigation lights.

The animated version requires Animatica and the "Iris Shaders PBR Beta Fix" in Entity Texture Features

![](https://i.imgur.com/32wKFYw.png)

![](https://i.imgur.com/NGLO3eB.png)
